name: ppt-order-autopilot
description: Agent-native PPT production and customer-order workflow with verified owner returns, per-slide workers, QA, delivery, and recovery.

interface.shortDescription: Run verified PPT jobs and customer orders
interface.longDescription: A progressive-disclosure Codex plugin for direct owner production, workspace/Codex/WeCom intake, one-slide-per-subagent image and editable modes, deterministic locked chrome, enforced stage commits, QA, recovery, and external delivery gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run or resume PPT Order Autopilot. For an existing order run tools/autopilot.py next first; commit every completed state. Distinguish owner_direct from customer_order. Before full production, show one complete-slide sample with all real visible content and wait for owner approval; default to image-first and reject a background-only image. Then use one slide subagent per page and never claim owner completion without the finish receipt.
